description_long: This is a large, double-headed sledgehammer with a robust, industrial design. The hammer features two massive, square striking heads made of weathered gray metal, each adorned with ornate gold bands and intricate engravings, giving it a decorative yet formidable appearance. The central shaft is reinforced with a coiled metallic wrap and a loop at the top, possibly for hanging or securing the tool. The handle is long, cylindrical, and appears to be wrapped in a dark, textured material for improved grip, ending in a capped base. The overall construction suggests significant weight and durability, suitable for heavy-duty tasks or ceremonial use. The surface of the metal heads shows a slightly rough, aged finish, while the gold accents add a touch of craftsmanship.
description: A large, ornate double-headed sledgehammer with engraved gold bands and a reinforced, textured handle. The weathered metal heads and decorative details suggest both strength and craftsmanship.
description_view_0: Front view shows both engraved metal heads, gold bands, and the coiled central shaft with the handle clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness and square shape of the hammer heads, with less visibility of the gold engravings.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying both ornate heads and the central shaft, but with less detail on the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizes the blocky, solid form of the heads, with minimal gold detail visible.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle wrapped in dark, textured leather for grip, reinforced with metallic coils near the head.
attribute_head_type: Double-headed sledgehammer with two large, square, flat-faced striking heads, decorated with gold bands and engravings.
